h1.content: display: inline-block; font-weight: bold; color: #fff; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #E91E63 0%, #FF5722 50%, #FFC107 100%); padding: 10px 28px; border-radius: 30px; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(233,30,99,0.3);

h2.content: font-weight: bold; color: #4CAF50; border-bottom: 3px dotted #81C784; padding-bottom: 6px;

h3.content: font-weight: bold; color: #FF9800; padding-left: 10px; border-left: 4px solid #FFB74D;

code.block: color: #37474F; background: #FFF9C4; border-radius: 16px; border: 2px dashed #FFD54F; margin: 1.2em 0; padding: 1em; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; white-space: pre-wrap;
code.inline: background: #F8BBD9; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 15px; color: #C2185B; font-size: 14px; border: none;

styles.quote: border: 3px solid transparent; border-image: linear-gradient(135deg, #E91E63, #FF9800, #4CAF50, #2196F3) 1; border-radius: 0; padding: 15px 20px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FCE4EC 0%, #FFF8E1 50%, #E8F5E9 100%); margin: 0.8em 0; color: #5D4037; font-style: normal;
styles.image: max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 1em auto; display: block; border-radius: 16px; border: 4px solid #FFCC80; box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
styles.link: color: #E91E63; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 2px dotted #F48FB1; font-weight: bold;

table.container: width: 100%; margin: 1em 0; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; border: 2px solid #81C784; border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden;
table.header: background: linear-gradient(135deg, #C8E6C9 0%, #DCEDC8 100%); font-weight: bold; color: #2E7D32; font-size: 1.05em;

footnote.ref: color: #E91E63; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.9em; font-weight: bold;
footnote.backref: color: #E91E63; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.9em; font-weight: bold;
